speaker_a.text: [matter-of-fact] I moved the budget review to next week, because finance needs one more day to check the numbers.

speaker_a.text: [conversational, focused] I think we should send the draft by Wednesday morning, if leg-
[conversational] That should give us enough time to review the numbers before the client call.

speaker_b.text: [curious] Do you want me to update the deck after that?

speaker_a.text: [thinking] I checked the deployment logs, and the restart happened right after the backup job finished. That probably means the scheduler triggered it.
